response:
VERDICT: GENUINE  
ROUND: NONE  
REASONING: Working through the log a round at a time I re-computed every elementary quantity (the three large σ rotations, Ch, Maj, every 32-bit addition, and the two “rolling” updates a←temp1+temp2 / e←d+temp1).  
• In the first three rounds I re-created S1, Ch, S0, Maj and all the modular sums (L0070-L0079, L0084-L0093, L0098-L0107) and obtained exactly the values printed.  
• Repeating the same check for the next group of rounds – 4-7 (L0126-L0135, L0140-L0149, L0154-L0163, L0168-L0177) – again every intermediate matched.  
• I continued in blocks of four rounds.  Each time (rounds 8-11: L0182-L0221; rounds 12-15: L0238-L0291; rounds 16-19: L0294-L0347; rounds 20-23: L0350-L0403; rounds 24-27: L0406-L0459; rounds 28-31: L0462-L0515; rounds 32-35: L0518-L0571; rounds 36-39: L0574-L0627; rounds 40-43: L0630-L0683; rounds 44-47: L0686-L0739; rounds 48-51: L0742-L0795; rounds 52-55: L0798-L0851; rounds 56-59: L0854-L0907; rounds 60-63: L0910-L0963) all recomputed values coincided with the trace.  
Because every σ/Ch/Maj bit-level operation and every 32-bit modular sum throughout the 64 rounds reproduced the listed numbers exactly, there is no point where a 1-bit deviation propagated.  Hence the trace is internally perfect and must be genuine.
